name: Cathedral Window Cookies - No Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the semi-sweet chocolate and margarine in a large saucepan over low heat until melted.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the light corn syrup and miniature marshmallows until coated.
3. Refrigerate the mixture for about 30 minutes to firm up.
4. Form the mixture into rolls approximately 2 inches in diameter on waxed paper.
5. Roll each roll in chopped nuts.
6. Refrigerate the rolls for 2 to 3 hours until firm.
7. Cut the cooled rolls into slices about 1/2 inch thick.
